data.title: Silicom (NASDAQ: SILC) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 8.0%, EPS $-0.34 vs $-0.37. Revenue increased by $2.42 million.
data.description: Tech company Silicom (NASDAQ: SILC) released its Q4 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 08:00 AM. They exceeded earnings expectations with an EPS of $-0.34 compared to the estimated $-0.37, a beat by 8.0%. Their revenue saw an increase of $2.42 million from the previous year. For a more detailed analysis, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bankwell Financial Group (BWFG) Q4 earnings: EPS $1.15 (vs. estimated $1.19), Revenue up $9.16M YoY. Visit Benzinga.com for more.
data.description: On Thursday, January 29, 2026, Bankwell Financial Group (NASDAQ: BWFG) released its Q4 earnings at 08:00 AM. The report revealed that the company fell short of projected earnings by -3.0%, with an EPS of $1.15 compared to the estimated $1.19. However, there was a notable increase in revenue, rising by $9.16 million from the previous year. In the previous quarter, Bankwell Financial Group had exceeded expectations. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xerox reports 25.7% yoy revenue growth to $2.03B in Q4, missing analyst estimates. Adjusted loss of 10 cents per share.
data.description: Xerox Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: XRX) released its fourth-quarter fiscal results, showcasing a 25.7% increase in revenue year-over-year to $2.03 billion. This figure fell short of the estimated $2.11 billion. On a constant currency basis, revenue increased by 23.6%. The company reported an adjusted loss of 10 cents per share, missing analysts' anticipated 10-cent profit. Equipment segment sales saw a 23.4% rise while post-sale revenue, covering services, consumables, and financing, increased by 26.5%. The gross margin decreased by 250 basis points to 28.6%, with equipment gross margin dropping by 1,540 basis points to 12.0% and post-sale margin rising by 130 basis points to 33.7%. Adjusted operating income also experienced a decrease.

data.title: Healthcare Triangle Inc. partners with Better.care to expand health data platform services across EMEA markets. HCTI becomes preferred provider in Europe, Southeast Asia, Middle East, and Africa.
data.description: An alliance has established Healthcare Triangle as the top service provider in rapidly expanding healthcare sectors in Europe, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. The collaboration, announced on January 29, 2026, in Pleasanton, California, involves Healthcare Triangle, Inc. (Nasdaq: HCTI), a prominent figure in the industry. This strategic move sets HCTI as the preferred service provider within the mentioned regions, maximizing its presence in key healthcare markets.

data.title: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 5, 2026, with a conference call at 10:00 AM ET.
data.description: Ladder Capital Corp (NYSE: LADR) announced that it will reveal its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 5, 2026, before the market opens. Following this, the Company will conduct a conference call and webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the outcomes with investors. To join the conference call, individuals can dial either (877) 407-4018 for domestic calls or (201) 689-8471 for international calls.

data.title: Ghanem Company introduces fractional ownership of real estate in KSA through REGA Sandbox in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
data.description: In Saudi Arabia, Ghanem Company has introduced fractional ownership of real estate through the REGA Sandbox initiative. This new offering allows individuals to own a portion of property, making real estate investment more accessible. Fractional ownership enables multiple investors to share ownership of a single property, lowering the barrier to entry for those looking to invest in the market. This innovative approach aims to attract investors looking to diversify their portfolios and participate in the lucrative real estate sector in KSA.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) will report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb. 13, 2026. Webcast/conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Marcus & Millichap, a prominent commercial real estate brokerage firm, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 13, 2026. The report will cover the period ending December 31, 2025. Prior to the market opening on the same day, the Company plans to unveil these results. Additionally, they will conduct a webcast and conference call at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to converse about the findings.
NASDAQ FUTURES PARE GAINS TO TRADE FLAT

data.title: UAE launches central bank-approved stablecoin USDU, backed by reserves from major banks, competing with USDC.
data.description: Universal Digital Intl Limited introduced USDU, the UAE's inaugural central bank-approved stablecoin, challenging Circle's USDC. This marks Universal Digital as the premier entity registered by the Central Bank of the UAE to issue a Foreign Payment Token, as per The Block. USDU is supported by reserves in dollars at key UAE banks like Emirates NBD, Mbank, and Mashreq. Circle, the issuer of USDC, obtained a license from Abu Dhabi Global Market in December for its operations.

data.title: R.J. Kielty now offers electrical services, becoming a one-stop provider. Expanding in New Port Richey, Florida, on Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: R.J. Kielty Plumbing, Air & Electric has recently introduced professional electrical services to its offerings, making it a comprehensive provider for plumbing, HVAC, and electrical solutions. The company's expansion into electrical services comes as part of its commitment to offering a one-stop shop for various home maintenance needs. This development was announced in New Port Richey, Florida on January 29, 2026, marking a significant step in their service portfolio. Customers can now access a wider range of services from a single trusted provider, simplifying their maintenance and repair needs.

data.title: CDP provides $1.56 million in grants to LA wildfires recovery, with total grants of $2.75 million last year.
data.description: Approximately $2.75 million has been distributed in grants to community partners via the California Wildfires Recovery Fund by CDP in the last year. The Eaton and Palisades Fires devastated Greater Los Angeles in January 2025.

data.title: Halifax West advised Stacker Holdings in acquiring Advanced Irrigation, co-invested in the acquisition. LOS ANGELES, Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: Halifax West acted as the sole financial advisor, spearheaded the debt market transaction, and co-invested alongside Stacker Holdings, Inc. in procuring Advanced Irrigation, Inc. The deal was finalized in Los Angeles on January 29, 2026. Halifax West, known for its expertise in independent ventures, played a pivotal role in facilitating the acquisition process.

data.title: Zylo's SaaS Management Index for 2026 shows surge in AI app adoption, with ChatGPT as most expensed app.
data.description: In Indianapolis on January 29, 2026, Zylo, a renowned enterprise SaaS Management company, unveiled the 2026 SaaS Management Index. This release highlights a significant trend in AI applications infiltrating businesses through expense-based acquisitions. Such purchases are fueling a swift rise in spending within enterprises, while simultaneously diminishing visibility into expenditures.

data.title: Audio Sellerz in Norton, Ohio, expands product line to include high-performance car audio equipment nationwide. Founded by Aaron Bryant, the company now offers top brands like Sky High Car.
data.description: A small business called Audio Sellerz, located in Norton, Ohio, has broadened its selection of car audio products to include high-end audio gear and installation necessities. Started by Aaron Bryant, a record-breaking individual, the company now provides items from leading brands such as Sky High Car.

data.title: Dr. Patrick Regan named National Director of General Surgery at Synergy Health Partners, leading expansion of general surgery service line.
data.description: Dr. Regan, formerly a part-time Surgicalist surgeon at Synergy, has been appointed to oversee the organization's growth in its general surgery service line. The announcement was made in San Diego on January 29, 2026. Synergy Health Partners, known for its groundbreaking surgical staffing solutions, aims to expand its services under Dr. Regan's leadership.

data.title: Charlotte Pipe and Foundry is the first official partner for the 2027 Military World Games, set to take place on U.S. soil.
data.description: A manufacturer based in Charlotte has made history by becoming the first Official Partner for the upcoming 8th CISM Military World Summer Games in 2027, to be held in the United States. The announcement was made by the 2027 Military World Games Local Organizing Committee on January 29, 2026. Charlotte Pipe, the Charlotte-based company, has joined hands with the MWG27 LOC to support the prestigious event. The partnership marks a significant step forward as preparations are underway for the games, which are set to attract a large number of participants and spectators.

data.title: Optilogic and ORTEC join forces to offer AI-powered supply chain solutions worldwide for optimized network design.
data.description: Two prominent companies, Optilogic and ORTEC, have joined forces to offer comprehensive network design and supply chain optimization services. Optilogic specializes in supply chain network design while ORTEC is a global leader in supply chain optimization. The partnership was announced on January 29, 2026 in a press release via PRNewswire-PRWeb. Optilogic, based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, and ORTEC, headquartered in Zoetermeer, The Netherlands, are recognized for their expertise in this field. This collaboration signifies a significant development in the industry, combining the strengths of both companies to provide unparalleled solutions.

data.title: Brazil's Raízen expands E2G ethanol plants with 4 new facilities in São Paulo; includes Penetron System.
data.description: A leading Brazilian energy company, Raízen, has been actively increasing its production of domestic second-generation ethanol (E2G) with the launch of four new plants in São Paulo state within the last three years. These new facilities have been equipped with the Penetron System, a range of waterproofing solutions, to ensure their efficiency and durability.
